name: Tuna in Scapece with Scallion Frocia
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 quarts water to a boil.
2. Cut tuna into 3/4-inch cubes and drop into boiling water. Lower heat to simmer and cook for 2 minutes. Drain carefully and set onto serving platter to cool in one layer.
3. In a mixing bowl, stir together olive oil, vinegar, garlic, tomatoes, mint, crushed peppers, and oregano flowers.
4. When tuna is cool, pour the liquid over it and set aside.
5. In a 6-inch to 8-inch non-stick sauté pan, heat 3 tablespoons oil until smoking.
6. In a mixing bowl, stir together eggs, scallions, and Pecorino. Pour into smoking pan and cook until omelet is set. Cool and cut into 6 pieces.
7. Divide tuna over pieces of fricassee and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
